Species_Available_Pct: % of 12 core species available from this supplier
Lower per-oz pricing scores higher; premium for organic certification acceptable
Batch documentation, CoA availability, testing protocols; highest weight for dried herb suppliers
Shorter lead time scores higher; single-season order windows penalized
Lower MOQ scores higher; important for pilot and small-batch ordering

Species_Availability_Count: Score >= 80 — Primary allocation. Cite in guides, recommend for practitioner sourcing, prioritize for any future physical product sourcing.
Score 65-79 — Secondary allocation. Cite for regional specificity or specialized species; evaluate for physical product sourcing when Tier A supply is constrained.
Score < 65 — Specialist use only. Photo contacts, single-species gap fillers, or future format evaluation only.
